share.title: Share this report
share.description: They'll receive their own secure link and confirm their email to open it.
share.defaultMessage: I wanted to share this efficacy report with you — I thought you'd find it worth a look.
share.sent: Report sent — they'll get their own secure link

downloadOnly.title: Download Document

awayPoster.title: We paused to protect your session
awayPoster.description: You were inactive since {{duration}}, so we paused the document preview to keep session safe.
awayPoster.ariaDescription: Your session was paused due to inactivity. Click continue or move your mouse to resume.
awayPoster.moveHint: Or just move your mouse or press any key to continue

report.title: Report an issue
report.description: See something inappropriate? We will take a look and, when appropriate, take action.
